sentences.text_original: 你今天怎么回来这么晚？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān zěnme huílái zhème wǎn?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Почему ты сегодня так поздно вернулся?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why did you come back so late today?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我去银行开户了，排队等了一个多小时。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qù yínháng kāihù le, páiduì děng le yí ge duō xiǎoshí.
sentences.text_translation: Bankka hisob ochgani bordim, navbatda bir soatdan ko'proq kutdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ходил в банк открывать счёт, в очереди прождал больше часа.
sentences.text_translation_en: I went to the bank to open an account — I waited in line for over an hour.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What service did you need to do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 开一张储蓄卡，以后工资打到这个卡里。
sentences.pinyin: Kāi yì zhāng chǔxùkǎ, yǐhòu gōngzī dǎ dào zhè ge kǎ lǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Bitta debet karta ochdim, bundan keyin maosh shu kartaga tushadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Открыл дебетовую карту, чтобы потом зарплата приходила на неё.
sentences.text_translation_en: I opened a debit card so my salary will go into it from now on.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation: Hisob ochish uchun nima olib borish kerak?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что нужно с собой для открытия счёта?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you need to bring to open an account?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 带身份证就行了。还要填一张表。
sentences.pinyin: Dài shēnfènzhèng jiù xíng le. Hái yào tián yì zhāng biǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Pasportni olib borsang bo'ldi. Yana bitta blank to'ldirish kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Достаточно взять удостоверение личности. Ещё нужно заполнить бланк.
sentences.text_translation_en: Just bring your ID card. You also have to fill in a form.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Is getting a card convenient these days?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还行。就是在柜台等了很久，人太多了。
sentences.pinyin: Hái xíng. Jiùshì zài guìtái děng le hěn jiǔ, rén tài duō le.
sentences.text_translation: Yomon emas. Faqat kassada uzoq kutdim, odam juda ko'p edi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Терпимо. Просто у стойки долго ждал — людей было слишком много.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's okay. I just waited a long time at the counter — there were too many people.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Do they charge for getting a card?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不收。但是每年要交十块的卡费。
sentences.pinyin: Bù shōu. Dànshì měinián yào jiāo shí kuài de kǎ fèi.
sentences.text_translation: Yo'q. Lekin har yili o'n yuanlik karta to'lovini to'lash kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Но каждый год нужно платить десять юаней за обслуживание карты.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. But you have to pay a ten-yuan card fee every year.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你的工资以后都存这张卡里吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ de gōngzī yǐhòu dōu cún zhè zhāng kǎ lǐ ma?
sentences.text_translation: Unda bundan keyin maoshing shu kartaga jamlanadimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Значит, теперь вся твоя зарплата будет храниться на этой карте?
sentences.text_translation_en: So from now on your salary will all be kept on this card?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。银行还帮我开通了手机银行，以后转账很方便。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Yínháng hái bāng wǒ kāitōng le shǒujī yínháng, yǐhòu zhuǎnzhàng hěn fāngbiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Bank menga mobil bankni ham ulab berdi, bundan keyin pul o'tkazish juda qulay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Банк ещё подключил мне мобильный банк, теперь переводить деньги очень удобно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. The bank also activated mobile banking for me, so transfers will be very convenient.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 只要自己小心，一般没问题。
sentences.pinyin: Zhǐyào zìjǐ xiǎoxīn, yìbān méi wèntí.
sentences.text_translation: O'zing ehtiyot bo'lsang bo'ldi, odatda muammo bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Если самому быть осторожным, обычно проблем нет.
sentences.text_translation_en: As long as you're careful, it's usually fine.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那挺好的。下次我也去开一张。
sentences.pinyin: Nà tǐng hǎo de. Xià cì wǒ yě qù kāi yì zhāng.
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda yaxshi. Keyingi safar men ham borib bittasini ochaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это здорово. В следующий раз и я схожу открою себе одну.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's great. Next time I'll go open one too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你最好早点去，不然人很多。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì hǎo zǎo diǎn qù, bùrán rén hěn duō.
sentences.text_translation: Ertaroq borganing ma'qul, aks holda odam ko'p bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Лучше иди пораньше, иначе будет много людей.
sentences.text_translation_en: You'd better go early, otherwise it gets crowded.
sentences.speaker: B
